### Post by n_hendrick on 2007-06-12
Just installed the new nvidia driver (the 100 series). It boots in and everything works until I try to run an opengl program like unreal or quake. Every opengl program even glxgears seg faults. I must be missing something....has anyone been successful with the new drivers?

Heres my xorg.conf just in case:


### Post by n_hendrick on 2007-06-14
anyway, I finally got it to work, I had disabled the kernel module in /etc/default somehow I just erased the reference and it worked no more segfault. FWOO.

---
